mapper.select: SELECT n.*, m.name as memberName FROM notices n LEFT JOIN member m ON n.member_id = m.username OR n.member_id = m.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices(title, member_id, content, ip_address, notice_start_date, notice_end_date, ref, step, depth) VALUES(#{title}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{ipAddress}, #{noticeStartDate}, #{noticeEndDate}, #{ref}, #{step}, #{depth})
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_start_date = #{noticeStartDate}, notice_end_date = #{noticeEndDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notices SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notices SET step = step + 1 WHERE ref = #{ref} AND step > #{step}
UPDATE notices SET ref = id WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_attachments(notice_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type) VALUES(#{noticeId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType})
INSERT INTO notice_comments(notice_id, parent_id, member_id, content) VALUES(#{noticeId}, #{parentId}, #{memberId}, #{content})
mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE CommentHierarchy AS ( SELECT id, notice_id, parent_id, member_id, content, created_at, updated_at, 0 AS depth, CAST(LPAD(id, 10, '0') AS CHAR(255)) AS path FROM notice_comments WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND parent_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.parent_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, ch.depth + 1 AS depth, CONCAT(ch.path, LPAD(c.id, 10, '0')) AS path FROM notice_comments c JOIN CommentHierarchy ch ON c.parent_id = ch.id ) SELECT ch.*, m.name as memberName FROM CommentHierarchy ch LEFT JOIN member m ON ch.member_id = m.username OR ch.member_id = m.id ORDER BY path ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notice_read_status(notice_id, member_id) VALUES(#{noticeId}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice_read_status WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
